race.comment: OCTOTHORPE (5) is on debut for the Noske's today after some strong trials coming into this. His most recent was very impressive over 950m at Lark Hill, and the draw should see him get every chance. With a little niggle on the raced brigade, he makes plenty of appeal. FUTURE REVOLUTION (4) finished behind OCTOTHORPE in his first trial before winning his latest effort at Lark Hill with Brad Parnham in the saddle. He remains in the irons for his racing debut in a good push for his chances. Drawn down low and can show what he's capable of. DESERT ORA (10) looks the best of the raced brigade, though the wide draw is a query. She flew home to just miss two back before sitting handy and ending up 0.6L off the winner last start. Rates highly, just needs some luck. BILLIE (9) was very impressive at the trials coming into this and can feature in her debut for the new stable. CEYONE (13) has shown enough at the trials to suggest she can run a cheeky race.
